title: The Washington Post's Design System (WPDS)
content: # Washington Post Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Design System from Directories: Components: The Washington Post Design System (WPDS) is an evolving repository of design elements and interactive features tailored specifically for washingtonpost.com WPDS empowers The Washington Post's design and development teams to deliver reader-focused digital products that are not only modular and elegant but also accessible. It ensures visual coherence across various platforms and scales, facilitating the creation of engaging and user-friendly experiences. Accessibility Color System Component status Elevation Figma Repository Icons Responsive Spacing Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Button Cards Checkbox Dialog Divider Drawer Icon Menus Navigation bar Pagination Popover Radio button Search Select Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip
